title: OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE - 211info
text: LIFEWORKS NW ST JOHNS OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Outpatient Mental Health Services provide therapy, mental health assessments, treatment planning, medication management, skills training, and consultation. Community-based services may also be provided as needed. 8425 N Lombard Street Portland, OR 97203 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-1pm Email (503) 645-9010 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 283-4776 Main phone For follow-up calls (503) 645-9010 Intake (888) 645-1666 Intake Toll-free Intake (503) 645-9010 Intake (888) 645-1666 Toll-free Main phone (503) 283-4776 For follow-up calls Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake FEES: Varies by program. Nearly all LifeWorks Northwest programs accept OHP/Medicaid and Medicare. Some programs serve uninsured individuals or offer free or discounted services. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 4, 17, and 75 Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Child Guidance Medication Information/Management Mental Health Evaluation Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ACTIVE PARENTING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILDREN'S RELIEF NURSERY INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT EDUCATION AND SUPPORT MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - DAY TREATMENT FOR CHILDREN AND YOUTH MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PARENT-CHILD INTERACTIVE THERAPY MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TRANSITION-AGE YOUTH SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
